tagline: Your One-Stop Solution for Premium Weekly Pool Service, Repairs, and Equipment in Tucson

hero.headline:
43 Years of Pools Done Right in
Tucson
hero.subheadline: Since 1983, Tucson families have trusted Splash Pool Service to keep their pools crystal clear. All-inclusive monthly plans, no hidden fees, and a money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied. Stop worrying about your pool and just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to major repairs, Splash handles it all. Every plan includes chemicals, water testing, and a team that treats your pool like their own.

cards.title: Full Pool Service
cards.description: Weekly visits with all chemicals, water testing, full system inspection, filter and basket cleaning, plus complete pool and spa cleaning. Everything handled for $165/month.

cards.title: Pool Repairs
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, lights, plumbing, and automation systems. Our technicians diagnose fast and fix it right the first time.

cards.title: Green Pool Cleanup
cards.description: Pool turned swamp-green? We drain it, scrub it, and restore it to crystal clear. Tucson heat makes this common, and we make it fast.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Heaters, IntelliCenter smart controls, and variable-speed pumps that cut energy costs up to 90%. Professionally installed and configured.

cards.title: Pool Tile Cleaning
cards.description: Mineral deposits and calcium buildup stripped away to restore your tile's original shine. Tucson's hard water doesn't stand a chance.

cards.title: Drain & Acid Wash
cards.description: Recommended every 3-5 years to remove stubborn stains and buildup. We drain, acid wash, and refill to make your pool look brand new.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll inspect your pool, assess its condition, and provide an honest recommendation with transparent pricing. No sales pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our team of 14 licensed professionals arrives on schedule every week. Chemicals, cleaning, inspections, and equipment checks are all included in your plan.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: Your pool stays swim-ready year-round in the Tucson sun. And if you're ever not satisfied, our money-back guarantee means you have nothing to lose.

about.label: Why Tucson Trusts Us Since 1983
about.headline: Family-Owned, Tucson-Rooted, and Here to Stay
about.description: Splash Pool Service has been a Tucson family business since 1983. Over 43 years, we've built our reputation one pool at a time — no shortcuts, no gimmicks. Licensed (ROC #327706), bonded, and insured, our team of 14 professionals treats every backyard like it belongs to family. That's why over 1,152 customers have left us verified reviews.

features.title: Licensed, Bonded & Insured
features.description: Fully licensed with the Arizona Registrar of Contractors (ROC #327706). Your property and investment are always protected.

features.title: Money-Back Guarantee
features.description: Not happy with our service? We'll refund your last month's payment. No questions, no hoops, no fine print.

features.title: Free Evaluations, Always
features.description: We never charge for an initial pool evaluation. We'll assess your pool's condition and recommend a plan before you spend a dime.

pricing.headline: All-Inclusive Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every plan includes chemicals, water testing, and weekly visits. Pick what fits your pool and upgrade or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our Money-Back Promise
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with our service, we'll refund your last month's payment. No fine print, no runaround. We've stood behind this guarantee since 1983 because we know our work speaks for itself. Over 1,152 customers agree.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are up and running within one week. We start with a free evaluation to assess your pool's condition, then schedule your regular service day. For green pool emergencies, we can often respond same-day.

faqs.question: What's included in the monthly price?
faqs.answer: All chemicals, water testing, and the service visit itself — everything is included. We never surprise you with add-on charges for chlorine, acid, or other supplies. The price you see is the price you pay.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We're licensed with the Arizona Registrar of Contractors (ROC #327706), bonded, and fully insured. Every one of our 14 team members is trained and vetted. Your property is always protected.

faqs.question: What if I'm not happy with the service?
faqs.answer: We offer a straightforward money-back guarantee. If you're unsatisfied, we'll refund your last month's payment — no questions asked. We've been in business 43 years because we stand behind our work.

faqs.question: Do you handle repairs and equipment too?
faqs.answer: Yes, we're a full-service pool company. Pumps, filters, heaters, lights, plumbing, automation systems, tile cleaning, acid washes — our licensed team handles it all, so you never need to call another contractor.

testimonials.name: Bedford
testimonials.text: I've been with Splash pool service for a combined 20 plus years. Outstanding service and professionalism from Nick and the entire team.

testimonials.name: Daniella
testimonials.text: Nick is incredible! He was polite, professional and got the job done. Transformed my pool from cloudy and dark green to crystal clear in less than two weeks with a very competitive monthly fee.

testimonials.name: David
testimonials.text: I've been using Splash Pool Service for nearly 15 years. Their service is consistent, professional, and I highly recommend them.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Practically Runs Itself?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation evaluation from Tucson's most trusted pool team. We'll assess your pool, recommend a plan, and have you swimming worry-free within a week.

footer.description: Family-owned pool service. Proudly serving Tucson since 1983.
